evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: les fondations sont ultra-propres, documentées et testées
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: JD balances clean infrastructure (rigour) with rapid execution and AI-native culture (velocity).
evidence.domain_risk: B2B data enrichment for sales teams
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate risk: impacts revenue/GTM but not financial reporting or compliance-critical.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Early maturity—first full-time data hire, though infrastructure is clean; role is to establish data team.
evidence.jd_authorship: Structurer les couches de données, pousser plus loin les modèles dbt et automatiser
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical responsibilities (dbt scaling, data layers, automation) indicate hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus on revenue operations and sales enablement (B2B data enrichment for commercial teams).
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic role—you create the data team, set direction, and drive complex business analyses.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate expected to use AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor) in daily development—AI-user classification.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Quality/testing mentioned in context of existing infrastructure but not as primary candidate responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Zéro chaos, que de l'impact; qualité des données
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: emphasis on data quality and clean foundations, but not compliance/regulatory.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: créer; bâtisseur; les fondations sont ultra-propres
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Greenfield—first data hire creating the function, though infrastructure foundation exists.
evidence.language_gate: French (hard requirement—job posted entirely in French, Parisian headquarters)
evidence.loss_aversion: Zéro chaos, que de l'impact — role emphasizes clean data infrastructure as a competitive advantage.
